name: The Quad Collective
description: What's left of the university, run by committee on the old campus — they ration by vote, keep a chore roster pinned to the quad noticeboard, and believe, stubbornly, that how you survive still matters.
notes: T53 · Hillcrest. Organized and friendly-leaning; jonah runs the radio mast. The collective's survivors regroup on the quad off-screen (PL-M3-02).
